name.en-US: Little Office of S. John Nepomucene, Martyr, The Singular Patron of Penitents and Those in Danger of Reputation

description.en-US: A traditional little office in honour of S. John Nepomucene, Martyr, The Singular Patron of Penitents and Those in Danger of Reputation, arranged in the canonical hours.

history.en-US: From a book of the same name published in 1741.
